prompt: A single vertically oriented fantasy trading card in a richly ornamented high-fantasy style, designed like a premium collectible TCG card with fully legible printed text and icons. The card has an elaborate dark navy and antique gold frame with filigree corners, embossed metallic trim, and a painterly realistic illustration in the center. At the top center, large serif title text reads {argument name="character name" default="VARIAN THE AZUREMAGE"}, with a smaller subtitle beneath reading {argument name="class line" default="HUMAN WIZARD"}. In the top left corner, place a circular blue mana-like emblem containing a white swirling arcane symbol. In the top right corner, place a small heraldic banner panel with 2 gold icons stacked vertically: an arcane starburst above an open book. Along the left edge, create a vertical stat column with exactly 4 icon-and-number rows on dark blue plaques: a sword icon with the number 2, a shield icon with the number 1, a red heart icon with the number 3, and a boot icon with the number 2. The central artwork shows a male human wizard in a cathedral-like magical interior filled with blue light and faint candles, wearing layered royal-blue robes and cloak with intricate gold embroidery, gilded armor accents, leather belts, pouches, scroll cases, and jeweled ornaments. He has dark wavy medium-length hair and a dramatic heroic pose, gripping an ornate staff in his left hand; the staff is black-gold with branching prongs and a glowing blue crystal near the top. His right arm is extended outward, conjuring a luminous spiral galaxy of blue arcane energy, star-like particles, and trailing magical ribbons that swirl around his hand. The mood is majestic, mystical, and cinematic, with intense sapphire highlights, deep shadows, painterly detail, and premium fantasy card-game illustration quality. At the bottom, add a parchment-colored rules text box with ornate corners and 2 abilities, each preceded by a blue arcane symbol bullet. The first ability title is bold serif text: ARCANE BOLT, followed by the rules text: When Varian attacks, he deals 2 damage to any target. The second ability title is bold serif text: MANA SURGE, followed by the rules text: Once per turn, you may pay 1 mana (with a blue water-drop mana icon) to draw a card. Beneath the abilities, add an italic flavor quote in blue-gray text: “Knowledge is the truest power. Master it, and the world is yours to shape.” In the lower left corner, place a large blue faceted gem badge with the number {argument name="mana cost" default="3"}. In the lower right corner, place a circular gold-framed open book icon. Along the bottom border, centered in gold serif text on a blue strip, write: {argument name="type line" default="ALLY • HUMAN • WIZARD"}. Make the whole card look like a polished professional TCG product mockup, crisp typography, balanced layout, ornate fantasy UI, and fully readable English text.
translatedPrompt: 一张垂直构图的奇幻集换式卡牌，采用华丽的古典奇幻风格，设计如同一张高级收藏级 TCG 卡牌，包含清晰可读的印刷文字和图标。卡牌拥有精致的深海军蓝与古金色边框，配有花丝边角、浮雕金属饰边，中心为写实风格的绘画插图。顶部中央为大型衬线标题文字，显示为 {argument name="character name" default="VARIAN THE AZUREMAGE"}，下方为较小的副标题 {argument name="class line" default="HUMAN WIZARD"}。左上角放置一个圆形的蓝色法力徽记，内含白色漩涡状奥术符号。右上角放置一个小型的纹章横幅面板，垂直排列 2 个金色图标：上方为奥术星芒，下方为一本打开的书。沿左侧边缘创建一个垂直属性栏，在深蓝色牌面上设有 4 行图标加数字：剑图标配数字 2，盾牌图标配数字 1，红色爱心图标配数字 3，靴子图标配数字 2。中央插图展示了一位男性人类法师，身处充满蓝色光芒和微弱烛光的教堂式魔法空间中，身穿层次分明的宝蓝色长袍和披风，饰有复杂的金色刺绣、镀金盔甲细节、皮带、小袋、卷轴盒和珠宝饰品。他留着深色中长波浪发，姿态英勇且富有戏剧性，左手紧握一根华丽的法杖；法杖为黑金配色，带有分叉的顶端，顶部附近镶嵌着一颗发光的蓝色水晶。他的右臂向外伸展，正在召唤一个由蓝色奥术能量、星状粒子和环绕手部的魔法丝带组成的螺旋星系。整体氛围庄严、神秘且具有电影质感，拥有强烈的蓝宝石色高光、深邃的阴影、细腻的绘画细节以及高级奇幻卡牌游戏的插画品质。底部添加一个羊皮纸色的规则文本框，带有华丽的边角和 2 个技能，每个技能前均有一个蓝色奥术符号作为项目符号。第一个技能标题为粗体衬线文字：ARCANE BOLT，后跟规则文本：When Varian attacks, he deals 2 damage to any target. 第二个技能标题为粗体衬线文字：MANA SURGE，后跟规则文本：Once per turn, you may pay 1 mana (with a blue water-drop mana icon) to draw a card. 在技能下方，添加一行蓝灰色斜体背景描述文字：“Knowledge is the truest power. Master it, and the world is yours to shape.” 左下角放置一个大型蓝色多面宝石徽章，数字为 {argument name="mana cost" default="3"}。右下角放置一个圆形金框打开的书本图标。沿底部边框，在蓝色条带上居中显示金色衬线文字：{argument name="type line" default="ALLY • HUMAN • WIZARD"}。使整张卡牌看起来像一张精致的专业 TCG 产品样机，具备清晰的排版、平衡的布局、华丽的奇幻 UI 以及完全可读的英文文本。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奇幻法师集换式卡牌：此提示词可生成一张精致的奇幻角色集换式卡牌，适用于人类法师角色，适合用于自定义卡牌游戏概念设计和样机制作。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 动漫分镜、战斗场景、运动瞬间、夸张叙事图
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 73；构图: centered, layered, vertical；风格: realistic, cinematic, fantasy, premium；要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 插画/漫画 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, fantasy, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
